MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
